artifacts.source_artifact: Release 0.0.2 scoped seven-planner publication bundle payload: reports/campaign_table_core.md
artifacts.caption_draft: Core planner overview from release 0.0.2, preserving readiness and fallback/degraded caveats from the release bundle.
artifacts.claim_boundary: Packaging existing release-backed table evidence for non-collision fields only; release 0.0.2 collision-count columns are withdrawn by issue #3482 because exact-event provenance was not recovered.
artifacts.fallback_degraded_summary: Release 0.0.2 is scoped to seven planners and excludes socnav_bench because licensed SocNavBench assets were not staged; fallback/degraded status must remain visible. Collision-count-derived claims are withdrawn by #3482.

artifacts.source_artifact: Release 0.0.2 scoped seven-planner publication bundle payload: reports/campaign_table.md
artifacts.caption_draft: Planner-level release 0.0.2 results table for the scoped seven-planner benchmark release.
artifacts.claim_boundary: Republishes existing release 0.0.2 table evidence for non-collision fields only; release 0.0.2 collision-count columns are withdrawn by issue #3482 and this does not establish new planner-ranking claims.
artifacts.fallback_degraded_summary: The scoped release excludes socnav_bench and records ORCA/SACADRL prerequisite policy as fallback while preserving readiness fields in the table. Collision-count-derived claims are withdrawn by #3482.

artifacts.source_artifact: Release 0.0.2 scoped seven-planner publication bundle payload: reports/scenario_family_breakdown.md

artifacts.claim_boundary: Republishes existing release 0.0.2 scenario-family table provenance for non-collision context only; collision-count/failure-count interpretations are withdrawn by issue #3482 because exact-event provenance was not recovered.
artifacts.fallback_degraded_summary: Use with the release 0.0.2 scoped-planner caveat and preserve unavailable/excluded planner limitations in surrounding prose. Do not use collision-count-derived rows as paper/dissertation evidence.
